description_long: This is a two-story wooden house with a prominent gambrel roof covered in red shingles. The front facade features two dormer windows and a central triangular gable, with a raised entryway accessible by an exterior staircase on the left. The house is elevated on posts, creating an open space beneath the main floor, and has large double doors on both sides of the ground level. Windows are symmetrically arranged, with blue-tinted glass panes and wooden frames. The roof includes skylights and a small central cupola, adding architectural interest and natural light. The exterior is clad in horizontal wooden siding, giving the house a rustic yet orderly appearance.
description: A two-story wooden house with a red gambrel roof, dormer windows, and a raised entryway accessed by an exterior staircase. The structure features symmetrical windows, a central gable, and is elevated on posts with open space below.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with two dormer windows, a central gable, and the raised entryway supported by posts.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase leading to the main door and the vertical wooden siding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full expanse of the red gambrel roof with skylights and the absence of windows or doors on this side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a pair of windows and the roof's dormer structure, without the staircase.
attribute_entryway_design: Raised entryway with exterior wooden staircase, single door, and no porch or overhang
